workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Can you work with me on forecast prep for Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery? I met with them last week but can't remember the details.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-16 12:26 EST
Subject: Re: forecast prep Discussion - Next Steps

Our team encountered some challenges with forecast prep. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
Date: 2024-02-28 15:01 EST
Subject: Re: forecast prep Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about forecast prep. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-05 15:03 EST
Subject: Follow-up: forecast prep Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with forecast prep. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF33-B trap (Tone mismatch in draft); produces complete Thread analysis, draft response, waiting-on-whom assessment, MSX pipeline note proposal (if warrante
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF33-B failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-B failure mode (Tone mismatch in draft)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct forecast prep decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF33-B -- Tone mismatch in draft
